name: Wild Rice Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl; mix well.
2. Firmly press the mixture into a greased 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
3. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 70 minutes.
4. Cover with foil during the last 15 minutes if the top is browning too quickly.
Yield: 4-6 servings.
